microsoft_ft: Formulated and articulated visionary product strategy for an AI-powered automation platform, defining product requirements and self-service capabilities that set new internal standards, reduced operational toil 30%, and transitioned execution to a scalable, **data-driven** model.

Drove product adoption with business development and partner teams, exploring new revenue growth points and delivering a first-of-its-kind proactive testing capability in 4 months at a **94% success rate**, surfacing critical defects and setting an industry model.

Continuously tracked and analyzed key product metrics to provide insights and iterative basis for decisions, directing 14 cross-org executions under executive visibility tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** in a sovereign-cloud environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process for a cross-functional R&D team.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost 13% and boosted conversions 2.7% by executing a **digital-first go-to-market strategy**, optimizing the website and Google profile to promote adoption and acquire media efficiently.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and seal margin leaks, surfacing data-driven insights for advertising and operational decisions.

tailoring_notes: Led with JD verbs (formulate/articulate visionary strategy, data drive, drive adoption) and surfaced generative AI, AIGC, and advertising-optimization vocabulary.
Reframed MSFT FT AI agent and adoption work as creative/generative AI product strategy; emphasized cross-functional R&D/design/BD collaboration.
Pulled GTM, advertising optimization, CAC and revenue-growth language from Pro Painters to mirror the advertising/creative ecosystem focus.
All bullets PM-titled and expanded toward 250-290 chars with data-driven and business-impact framing.
